TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_nipaluma-hnalumay,_hnalomay, title = nipaluma-hnalumay,_hnalomay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/nipaluma-hnalumay,_hnalomay} }

S.FORM: == hnalumay, hnalomay == ťĽÉťĶ™ŤćČ u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == ńßnar~…ĺumaj, ńßnar~…ĺomaj == *** u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
S.FORM: == hnalumay, hnalomay == ťĽÉťĶ™ŤćČ u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == ńßnar~…ĺumaj, ńßnar~…ĺomaj == *** u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
